allow: Bash(node -e "const d=require\('./data/data.json'\); const us=d.regions[0]; console.log\(JSON.stringify\(us.industry,null,1\)\); console.log\('chinaImport:',JSON.stringify\(us.chinaImport\)\); const de=d.regions[1]; console.log\('DE 工业增加值:',JSON.stringify\(de.macro.find\(x=>x.nm==='工业增加值'\)\)\); console.log\('DE 粗钢:',JSON.stringify\(de.industry[0]\)\); console.log\('VN chinaImport:',JSON.stringify\(d.regions[3].chinaImport\)\);")
